name: ailpha-platform
description: OctoBus package for the AiLPHA security analysis & management platform (SIEM/SOC): merged-alarm query/detail/disposition and linkage-strategy IP block/unblock through the /openapi REST API.

AiLPHA_Platform.AiLPHA_Platform/GetMerge.name: get-merge-alarm-detail
AiLPHA_Platform.AiLPHA_Platform/GetMerge.description: Get an AiLPHA merged alarm detail.

AiLPHA_Platform.AiLPHA_Platform/BlockIp.name: block-ip
AiLPHA_Platform.AiLPHA_Platform/BlockIp.description: Apply IP block on AiLPHA linkage strategies.

AiLPHA_Platform.AiLPHA_Platform/UnblockI.name: unblock-ip
AiLPHA_Platform.AiLPHA_Platform/UnblockI.description: Remove IP block from AiLPHA linkage strategies.
